description:
A pixel art 2D speedrun platformer featuring 17 levels and isometric mechanics.
markdown

A challenging 2D pixel art speedrun platformer built with the Redot/Godot Engine. 
Navigate through 17 handcrafted levels, master slopes, and battle enemies 
using precise jump-and-run mechanics.

Key Features:
- Classic side-scrolling action with crouching, running, and shooting.
- Unique Isometric Twist: Experience Level 16 with a traditional isometric 
  depth-sorted view and bomb-dropping mechanics.
- Multiple Hazards: Interact with crawling and flying enemies, moving 
  platforms, and physics-based obstacles.
- Cross-Platform Controls: Full support for keyboard, touchscreen, and gamepads.
- 100% Open Source: Based on Godot's professional demos, extended with 
  original music (made on Android) and custom animations.

Master the levels, collect coins, collect keys, and reach the goal in the shortest time possible!
